pppoe-profile.name: ${pppoe\-profile\-name}
pppoe-profile.pppoe-vendor-specific-tag:
<#if circuit\-id?has_content>
     ${circuit\-id}
     </#if>
     <#if circuit\-id\-syntax?has_content>
     ${circuit\-id\-syntax}
     </#if>
     <#if remote\-id?has_content>
     ${remote\-id}
     </#if>
     <#if remote\-id\-syntax?has_content>
     ${remote\-id\-syntax}
     </#if>
     <#if access\-loop\-characteristics?has_content && access\-loop\-suboptions?has_content>
     ${access\-loop\-characteristics}
     ${access\-loop\-suboptions}
     <#elseif access\-loop\-characteristics?has_content>
     ${access\-loop\-characteristics}
     </#if>
     <#if start\-numbering\-from\-zero?has_content>
     ${start\-numbering\-from\-zero}
     </#if>
     <#if use\-leading\-zero?has_content>
     ${use\-leading\-zero}
     </#if>
